name: SB19
description:
'''SB19''' (short for '''Sound Break 19''') is a Filipino [[boy band]] formed in 2018 by [[ShowBT Entertainment|ShowBT Philippines]]. The group consists of five members: [[Pablo (Filipino musician)|Pablo]], [[Josh Cullen (musician)|Josh]], [[Stell (singer)|Stell]], [[Felip (musician)|Ken]], and [[Justin (Filipino musician)|Justin]]. Dubbed the "[[Honorific nicknames in popular music|Kings of P-pop]]", they are credited for their contributions in bringing [[Pinoy pop|Philippine Pop]] music internationally and are considered one of the most influential acts in the genre.

They became the first Southeast Asian act to be nominated for a [[Billboard Music Awards|''Billboard'' Music Award]], as well as the first Southeast Asian act to make an appearance in the top 10 of the [[Billboard Social 50|''Billboard'' Social 50]]. Since 2023, they are a self-managed group under [[1Z Entertainment]], a company established by the members. As artists, they are known for their genre-bending musical style, self-production and live vocal performances. They have won numerous [[List of awards and nominations received by SB19|local and international awards]] throughout their career as Filipino musicians and performers. The group promotes their music as part of [[Pinoy pop]], a sub-genre of [[Music of the Philippines#Popular music|Original Pilipino Music]]. 

In 2025, following the release of their ''[[Simula at Wakas|Simula at Wakas EP]]'', SB19 became the first Filipino act to hold and sell out two nights at the [[Philippine Arena]] with the kickoff to their ''[[Simula at Wakas World Tour]]''. The succeeding international tour included stops all over North America, Asia, Middle East and Oceania. The EP garnered chart success both locally and internationally.
